channel.title: Vitamin D in Australia and New Zealand on VitaminDWiki
channel.description: Recent content in Vitamin D in Australia and New Zealand on VitaminDWiki

item.title: Little Vitamin D while pregnant in Asia – survey
item.description:
• Clinical practice of vitamin D screening and supplementation in pregnancy in Asia-pacific countries: A cross-sectional study
      • Survey Questions:
      • VitaminDWiki – Breastfeeding and Vitamin D - many studies: 39+ as of Dec 2023

Clinical practice of vitamin D screening and supplementation in pregnancy in Asia-pacific countries: A cross-sectional study

Heliyon https://doi.org/10.10167j.heliyon.2023.e21186

Ryan Wai Kheong Lee, Alicia Li Bin Chng, Kok Hian Tan , IPRAMHO International Study Group

Background: Vitamin D deficiency is common in pregnant women. There is scarce information in the Asia-Pacific region on the understanding of vitamin D screening and supplementation in pregnancy among health care professionals.

item.title: COVID vaccines are highly effective in reducing non-COVID deaths in older Australians (not)
item.description:
• THE COVID PROPAGANDA WAR CONTINUES
      • Excess deaths - 5 possible reasons - many studies
      • See also Australia in VitaminDWiki

THE COVID PROPAGANDA WAR CONTINUES

Substack

  • “The paper contains the outrageous claim that the Covid “vaccines” are highly effective in reducing Covid-19 AND OTHER NON-COVID CAUSES OF MORTALITY FOR OLDER AUSTRALIANS. How is this possible?”

Excess deaths - 5 possible reasons - many studies

See also Australia in VitaminDWiki

  • Hospital utilization Australia (NSW) 1415 Vaccinated, 0 unvaccinated - Dec 2022

item.title: Australia’s COVID Response resulted in 31 X more life years lost than were saved
item.description:
Australia’s Covid-19 Pandemic Response Failed Us

Institute for Public Affairs

  • “The costs of joblessness and not working on life expectancy as a result for the first nationwide lockdowns in March and April 2020 were 31 times greater than the maximum possible benefits of all lockdowns.”

Hard Lessons report PDF

Table of Contents

item.title: Test Vitamin D, get a tiny dose, no benefit, conclusion: should not have tested (Australia this time)
item.description:
• Health, financial and environmental impacts of unnecessary vitamin D testing: a triple bottom line assessment adapted for healthcare
      • Australia considered Vitamin D RDA = 200 IU (adding 200 IU has never been proven to help anything)
      • Australia considers >20ng to be adequate, so many summer tests were worthless
      • Process should be: 1) Vitamin D loading dose, 2) See how it feels in the next 4 weeks
      • History of US Vitamin D RDA: 200, 400, 600, and now 1200 IU for average male
      • See related in VitaminDWiki
      • Rapid response: Vitamin D testing should be aimed at raising vitamin D levels to optimal values (Dr. Grant)

Health, financial and environmental impacts of unnecessary vitamin D testing: a triple bottom line assessment adapted for healthcare

BMJ Open 2022;12:e056997. doi:10.1136/ bmjopen-2021-056997

item.title: Another country needs more vitamin D (Australia in this case)
item.description:
• Evidence of low vitamin D intakes in the Australian population points to a need for data-driven nutrition policy for improving population vitamin D status
      • VitaminDWiki - Interview discusses deficiency, lack of consensus, quickly increasing levels, dose sizes. etc

Evidence of low vitamin D intakes in the Australian population points to a need for data-driven nutrition policy for improving population vitamin D status

J Hum Nutr Diet . 2022 Mar 7. doi:10.1111/jhn.13002

item.title: Vitamin D deficient – 1 in 3 of young Australians have less than 20 ng
item.description:
Prevalence and predictors of vitamin D deficiency in a nationally representative sample of Australian adolescents and young adults

European Journal of Clinical Nutrition (2021)

Kahlea Horton-French, Eleanor Dunlop, Robyn M. Lucas, Gavin Pereira & Lucinda J. Black

Young = 16 - 24 years old
1 in 3 <20 ng average year round
3.3 X more likely to have <20 ng in the winter across entire country
    probably much worse in those states furthest from equator

item.title: 94 X increase in Vitamin D testing in Australia (2000-2010, then they shut it down)
item.description:
(Oral Presentation)  Vitamin D test ordering practices of australian general practitioners between 2007 and 2017: evidence from electronic health records

BMJ Evidence Based Medicine http://dx.doi.org/10.1136/bmjebm-2019-POD.43

Gorkem Sezgin, Andrew Georgiou

  • Australians paying for most Vitamin D tests, 40 percent deficient in winter - March 2019

  • 80 X increase in Vitamin D testing in Australia in a decade - June 2013

item.title: Australians paying for most Vitamin D tests, 40 percent deficient in winter
item.description:
• UK considers Vitamin D tests appropriate for only 4 existing health problems, – June 2018

  • Mandatory Vitamin D screening for all patients – vitamin D conference in Middle East – March 2017
